description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named github-windows that runs on push and pull request events. Use a windows-2022 job with concurrency control that cancels in-progress jobs for pull requests. Check out the repository, install dependencies with vcpkg, check out a secondary repository kokkos/kokkos at ref 4.6.00, install Kokkos with threads support, and then configure and build ArborX with specific CMake flags.
